TERMS & CONDITIONS

Home/Terms

Last updated: March 2026

By accessing www.wastewaterevaporation.com, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

Use of the site

Content is provided for general information about Asiatic Engineers’ products and services. Technical, commercial, and regulatory situations vary by site; formal proposals and contracts supersede any general statement on this website.

Intellectual property

Text, graphics, logos, and other materials on this site are owned by Asiatic Engineers or used with permission. You may not copy, modify, or distribute them for commercial use without prior written consent.

No warranties

The site is provided “as is”. We make no warranties about completeness, accuracy, or fitness for a particular purpose. Nothing on this site constitutes professional engineering or legal advice.

Governing law

These terms are governed by the laws of Gujarat, India, and courts in Ahmedabad shall have jurisdiction, subject to applicable law.
